calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Jocelin Alejandra Corena was sworn and examined. Court signs Decree changing name to Jocelin Alejandra Rodriguez Corena.
